title: Shepherds of the Wild
description: Shepherds of the Wild — knowledge fragments for AI agents

'Table of Contents'

memes.label: "Alice Crowson"
memes.description: "Daughter of Ezra Crowson, a camp-tender and shepherd in Smoky Land — Hugh Gaylord's love interest and a capable wilderness woman."

memes.label: "Bear Canyon"
memes.description: "A canyon in Smoky Land — one of the deep forested valleys that define the region's rugged geography."

memes.label: "Beauty"
memes.description: "The aesthetic dimension of the wilderness — a beauty that is inseparable from danger and that transforms those who learn to see it in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Bighorn Sheep"
memes.description: "The monarchs of the high peaks — the wild sheep of Smoky Land whose mastery of the mountain trails no predator can match, represented in the novel by Spot, Old Argali, and Old Surefoot."

memes.label: "Bill Elkins"
memes.description: "A herder who defected to Landy Fargo's gang — his actions indirectly set the events of the novel in motion by driving Old Argali's wild ewes back to the domestic flock."

memes.label: Black Bear
memes.description: The black bear of Smoky Land, known to the forest as "Growl-in-the-throat" — the "most lovable spirit in the forest" who commands respect even from the bull elk and grumbles his way through the ridges with blundering grace.

memes.label: Blood
memes.description: Primal life force in the wilderness — blood as vitality, violence, and inherited instinct, central to the hunting hour and the wild's eternal rhythms.

memes.label: "Broken Fang"
memes.description: "The great cougar of Smoky Land — an aging monarch and legendary predator whose reign of terror shapes the novel's central conflict between shepherd and wild."

memes.label: Buzzard (Turkey Vulture)
memes.description: The buzzard circles the skies of Smoky Land as an ever-present symbol of death — a patient scavenger whose daily watch from the clouds speaks to the wilderness's deep familiarity with mortality.

memes.label: "Canyon"
memes.description: "The canyon as a recurring threshold in Smoky Land — a place of shadow, ambush, and passage that marks critical transitions in the novel's action and characters' fates."

memes.label: Cattlemen (Smoky Land Ranchers)
memes.description: The cattlemen of Smoky Land are the established ranching interests who wage economic war against the sheep herders, using "range law" and hired violence to maintain a grazing monopoly on the public domain.

memes.label: Character Index
memes.description: A dynamic index of all characters in Shepherds of the Wild, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Chipmunk
memes.description: The chipmunk is the smallest watcher in the Smoky Land forest — a creature of quick movements and sharper eyes whose brief appearances mark moments of heightened awareness in the novel's predator-prey drama.

memes.label: "Civilization"
memes.description: "The world of cities, clubs, and comforts that Hugh Gaylord leaves behind — portrayed in the novel as a transient surface over the enduring realities of wilderness life."

memes.label: "Ambush"
memes.description: "The predatory tactic of concealment and surprise attack that governs the relationship between hunter and hunted in Smoky Land, and its darker extension into human violence."

memes.label: "Battle"
memes.description: "The ongoing struggle for survival that defines life in Smoky Land — a constant battle waged by every creature against hunger, predators, and the indifferent forces of the wilderness."

memes.label: "Blood"
memes.description: "Blood as the novel's central metaphor for the wild vitality that civilization represses — the force that animates predator and shepherd alike in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: Camp
memes.description: The sheep herders' camp as a frontier outpost and liminal space between civilization and wilderness in Smoky Land.

memes.label: Camp Fire
memes.description: The central gathering place of wilderness life — source of warmth, light, food, and human connection against the dark.

memes.label: "Cold"
memes.description: "The elemental force of cold in the wilderness — a test of endurance, a companion of darkness, and a constant presence in the high country that shapes the lives of every creature in Smoky Land."

memes.label: "Comradeship"
memes.description: "The bond of mutual loyalty and shared trial that forms between men and between man and beast in the wilderness, contrasted with the superficial friendships of civilization."

memes.label: Creek
memes.description: The mountain waterways of Smoky Land—particularly Silver Creek—as sources of both physical danger and spiritual renewal.

memes.label: "Darkness"
memes.description: "The transformative power of darkness in Smoky Land — a time of mystery, predator awakening, and inner reckoning for Hugh Gaylord."

memes.label: "Dawn"
memes.description: "The transitional hour in Smoky Land when the night's reign of predators ends, the sheep begin their day's grazing, and the wilderness shifts from the dominion of fang and claw to the world of light and human activity."

memes.label: Despair
memes.description: Despair in Shepherds of the Wild is the emotional underside of wilderness life — a quiet agony born of loss, loneliness, and the relentless cruelty of nature.

memes.label: Dream
memes.description: Dreams in Shepherds of the Wild serve as windows into the subconscious fears and desires of both human and animal characters, blurring the line between waking vigilance and the wilderness of sleep.

memes.label: "Drought"
memes.description: "The prolonged absence of rain in Smoky Land, a natural cycle that reshapes the wilderness hierarchy, tests the endurance of all creatures, and serves as the backdrop for the novel's climactic forest fire."

memes.label: Endurance
memes.description: The capacity to withstand hardship — physical, mental, and spiritual — that defines survival in the wild.

memes.label: Fang
memes.description: Fangs are the ultimate symbols of predatory power in the novel, representing the lethal edge of the wilderness food chain and the violence beneath its beauty.

memes.label: Fate
memes.description: The inexorable forces — nature, instinct, circumstance — that shape the lives of men and beasts in the wilderness.

memes.label: Feast
memes.description: The primal predatory excess that the novel portrays as the darkest violation of wilderness law.

memes.label: "Fire"
memes.description: "The campfire as the shepherd's ancient companion — warmth, protection, and the symbolic center of wilderness life that holds the beasts of prey at bay and connects Hugh to uncounted generations of herders."

memes.label: "Flock"
memes.description: "The flock as the central symbol of stewardship and the ancient bond between herder and the natural order in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: Flood
memes.description: The overwhelming force of water as both a literal hazard and a metaphor for emotional and narrative inundation in the wilderness.

memes.label: "Food Chain"
memes.description: "The ecological hierarchy of predator and prey in Smoky Land, reflecting the wilderness order in which every creature is both hunter and hunted."

memes.label: "Forest"
memes.description: "The evergreen forest as the novel's primary setting — a realm of mystery, danger, enchantment, and the stage upon which the ancient drama of predator and prey unfolds."

memes.label: Freedom
memes.description: The untamed liberty of the wilderness and the tension between wild freedom and human constraint.

memes.label: "Frontier"
memes.description: "The geographical and symbolic boundary between civilization and wilderness in Smoky Land — a threshold where human order meets the primeval, and where characters are tested and transformed."

memes.label: Glory
memes.description: Glory in Shepherds of the Wild is the fierce splendor of the natural world — the "hour of glory" when predators hunt, the sun breaking over mountains, and the prophecy of a wild world restored.

memes.label: Guide
memes.description: The guide embodies the tension between human dependence and self-reliance in the wilderness, represented most vividly through Pete the unreliable Indian guide.

memes.label: "Heritage"
memes.description: "The ancestral connection to the wilderness that Hugh Gaylord has lost through generations of city life — and that the wild creatures of Smoky Land possess by birthright."

memes.label: Hope
memes.description: The sustaining belief in a better outcome that drives characters through hardship in the wilderness.

memes.label: Law
memes.description: The codes of conduct—both human and natural—that govern behavior in the wilderness, from national statutes to the unwritten laws of predator and prey.

memes.label: Leadership
memes.description: The quality of guiding and protecting others in the wilderness — expressed through the flock leader, the pack leader, and the human herder who takes responsibility for those in his care.

memes.label: Lightning
memes.description: The motif of sudden, terrible power in nature—used to describe both the swift violence of predators and the overwhelming forces of the wilderness.

memes.label: Loneliness
memes.description: Loneliness in Shepherds of the Wild is the existential condition of the shepherd — a silence so profound it becomes a presence, shaping consciousness as surely as the mountains shape the land.

memes.label: Meadow
memes.description: The grassy mountain clearings of Smoky Land that serve as grazing grounds for sheep and the threshold between human domain and the Kingdom of the Wild.

memes.label: Memory
memes.description: Memory in Shepherds of the Wild is the human link to a world before and beyond the wilderness — a fragile tether to civilization that both sustains and haunts the shepherd.

memes.label: "Mexican Herders"
memes.description: "The ethnic and class dimension of sheep-herding labor in the early twentieth-century American West — Mexican herders formed the backbone of the industry, facing prejudice, danger, and economic exploitation."

memes.label: Miracle
memes.description: The unexpected grace and wonder that breaks through the harshness of wilderness life.

memes.label: "Moonlight"
memes.description: "Moonlight as the predator's illumination in Smoky Land — a cold, revealing light that transforms the forest into a theater of hunt and death, and the light by which Hugh comes to see the wilderness truly."

memes.label: "Night"
memes.description: "Night as the sovereign hour of the wilderness — the time when predators reign, the ancient war resumes, and Hugh Gaylord confronts the primordial truths that daylight civilization conceals."

memes.label: "Pack"
memes.description: "The wolf pack as the embodiment of collective predation in Smoky Land — a social unit whose song of death and hunger echoes through the wilderness, and whose dark mirror appears in Fargo's pack of bear dogs."

memes.label: "Prey"
memes.description: "The hunted animals of Smoky Land, caught in the eternal food-chain struggle between predator and the vulnerable — sheep, deer, and all creatures that live under the shadow of fang and claw."

memes.label: Pride
memes.description: The sense of self-worth that sustains characters in the wilderness — both the noble pride of the capable and the destructive pride that precedes a fall.

memes.label: Rage
memes.description: The consuming, transformative anger that overtakes characters — human and animal — in moments of extreme threat or violation.

memes.label: "Renewal"
memes.description: "The cyclical force of regeneration in Smoky Land — the wilderness principle that life returns after death, spring follows winter, and the forest regrows after fire in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Rifle"
memes.description: "The herder's essential tool of protection in the wilderness — a symbol of human dominion over the wild, the thin line between safety and slaughter, and the moral weight of the power to kill."

memes.label: River
memes.description: The river runs through the novel as a source of life, a site of danger, and a boundary between the known and the wild.

memes.label: "Season"
memes.description: "The cyclical rhythm of the natural year in Smoky Land — marked by the wild creatures and the land itself, independent of human calendars, governing the life and death of all living things."

memes.label: "Shadow"
memes.description: "The shifting patterns of shadow in the wilderness — a realm of concealment, menace, and the predator's hour of triumph."

memes.label: Shelter
memes.description: Shelter in Shepherds of the Wild is the fragile boundary between safety and exposure — whether a shepherd's cabin, a rock overhang, or the psychological comfort of companionship in the wilderness.

memes.label: "Shepherd Dog"
memes.description: "The shepherd dog as the embodiment of fidelity, courage, and the ancient covenant between herder and guardian in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Sky"
memes.description: "The overarching presence above Smoky Land — a mirror of wilderness moods, a navigator's guide, and a silent witness to the drama below."

memes.label: Smoke
memes.description: The pale blue haze that gives Smoky Land its name and symbolizes the frontier between civilization and wilderness.

memes.label: "Snow"
memes.description: "Snow as the face of winter in Smoky Land — a phenomenon that transforms the landscape, tests the wild creatures, and reveals the harsh beauty of the high Rockies."

memes.label: "Spirit"
memes.description: "The inner quality of courage, resilience, and connection to the wilderness that distinguishes those who truly belong to Smoky Land from those who merely pass through it."

memes.label: "Spread Horn"
memes.description: "The distinctive antler formation of the bull elk — a mark of maturity, a calendar of the seasons, and a symbol of natural majesty and dominance in Smoky Land."

memes.label: "Spring"
memes.description: "The season of renewal in Smoky Land — a time of birth, returning life, and the ancient rhythms that govern the wilderness."

memes.label: Stalk
memes.description: The stalk in Shepherds of the Wild is the predator's primary mode of being — a patient, silent approach that transforms the forest into a theater of hidden menace.

memes.label: Stars
memes.description: Stars in Shepherds of the Wild represent the eternal, peaceful backdrop against which the drama of wilderness survival unfolds — a reminder of beauty beyond the immediate struggle.

memes.label: Strength
memes.description: Physical strength is a central survival trait in the wilderness, determining dominance, survival, and the outcome of every confrontation in the novel.

memes.label: Sun
memes.description: The harsh and beautiful light that shapes the rhythm of wilderness life in Smoky Land.

memes.label: "Thicket"
memes.description: "The dense undergrowth of Smoky Land — a realm of concealment, ambush, and the hidden dramas of predator and prey, and the physical measure of a character's relationship to the wilderness."

memes.label: Trail
memes.description: The trails of the wilderness serve as arteries of movement, encounter, and conflict for both animal and human characters in the novel.

memes.label: "Twilight"
memes.description: "The transitional hour between day and night in Smoky Land — a time of clarity, mystery, and the eternal herder's fire glowing against the falling darkness."

memes.label: "Vigil"
memes.description: "The shepherd's sacred duty of watchfulness — the constant, sleepless guardianship over the flock that defines the shepherd's role, connects Hugh to an unbroken lineage of herders stretching back to antiquity, and constitutes the moral center of the novel."

memes.label: Water
memes.description: The life-giving element that shapes the landscape and sustains the wild creatures of Smoky Land.

memes.label: "Wind"
memes.description: "The wind as messenger, sculptor of landscape, namesake of Smoky Land, and the primary medium of information in the wilderness — a primal force that governs life, death, and the awareness of every creature."

memes.label: "Winter"
memes.description: "The season of scarcity and trial in Smoky Land — when snow blankets the high ridges, the wolf pack sings of hunger, and only the hardiest creatures endure the bitter cold."

memes.label: Wound
memes.description: Physical injury as a transformative event in the wilderness — a test of endurance, a mark of conflict, and a bond between the wounded and those who tend them.

memes.label: Concepts Index
memes.description: A dynamic thematic index of key concepts, ideas, and abstract themes explored in Shepherds of the Wild.

memes.label: "Cougar (Puma)"
memes.description: "The apex predator of Smoky Land — embodied by Broken Fang, the legendary aging cougar whose reign of terror and final decline mirror the passing of the old wilderness order in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Courage"
memes.description: "The quality of facing danger and death without yielding — a defining trait of both the shepherd dogs and the wilderness men of Smoky Land."

memes.label: "Coyote"
memes.description: "The ever-present mesopredator of Smoky Land — cowardly alone but relentless in numbers, a foil to the nobler predators and a symbol of the mundane, unglamorous dangers that define a shepherd's daily vigil."

memes.label: Cruelty
memes.description: The infliction of suffering beyond what survival requires — a distinctly human corruption of the natural order, where predation serves necessity but cruelty serves only itself.

memes.label: "Cry-in-the-night"
memes.description: "The great wolf of Smoky Land — a shadowy predator whose howl haunts the wilderness nights and whose presence defines the boundary between the domestic flock and the wild."
aliases: the great wolf of Smoky Land

memes.label: "Dan"
memes.description: "Hugh Gaylord's murdered predecessor — the Italian sheep herder whose death by José Mertos's rifle sets the novel's central crime in motion in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: Danger
memes.description: The omnipresent condition of life in Smoky Land — a constant awareness that death waits in the forest shadows, shaping every decision and defining every relationship.

memes.label: "Death"
memes.description: "The omnipresent reality of death in the wilderness — a natural force that governs all creatures, serves as the ultimate test of character, and gives weight to every choice made in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Destiny"
memes.description: "The sense of preordained purpose that draws characters to the wilderness life — a conviction that their place in Smoky Land is not chosen but fated."

memes.label: Dominance
memes.description: The hierarchical ordering of power in the wilderness — from the grizzly at the top to the coyote at the bottom, and the human conflicts that mirror this natural order.

memes.label: Dream
memes.description: The threshold between waking and ancestral memory — dreams in the wilderness carry ancient knowledge of predator and prey, shepherd and flock, reaching back to the dawn of human experience.

memes.label: Golden Eagle
memes.description: The golden eagle of the Upper Salmon Mountains — called Swift Wing by the bighorn sheep — is the winged death that falls from the clouds to menace the young lambs, a predator whose shadow alone is enough to freeze Spot's heart with terror.

memes.label: "Ezra Crowson"
memes.description: "Father of Alice Crowson and owner of a sheep outfit in Smoky Land — mentioned only in passing but central to the story's domestic framework."

memes.label: "Fargo's Outfit"
memes.description: "Landy Fargo's criminal sheep enterprise in Smoky Land — a gang that uses murder, intimidation, and range-law tactics to monopolize grazing territory, representing the systematic corruption of the shepherd's calling into an instrument of greed."

memes.label: "Fear"
memes.description: "The primal emotion that governs the behavior of all creatures in the wilderness — both a survival instinct and a moral test in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Fidelity"
memes.description: "The unwavering loyalty that binds the shepherd dogs to their masters — a sacred bond that transcends instinct and becomes the moral center of Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Flock"
memes.description: "The sheep flock as the central entity of the shepherd's life — thousands of defenseless ewes and lambs whose protection defines the novel's moral universe."

memes.label: "Forest"
memes.description: "The forest as the living, breathing setting of Smoky Land — a realm of mystery, danger, and primeval beauty that shapes every character who enters it."

memes.label: "The Great Forest Fire"
memes.description: "The catastrophic forest fire that sweeps through Smoky Land in the novel's climax — an eight-chapter ordeal that forces every character, human and animal, to flee for their lives and reshapes both the physical landscape and the novel's moral order."

memes.label: "Game Trail"
memes.description: "The narrow, winding paths through the Smoky Land wilderness, carved by centuries of wild creatures — serving as arteries of movement, hunting, and flight in the novel's ecosystem."

memes.label: Glory
memes.description: Triumph and exultation in the wilderness — the glory of the hunt, the glory of the peaks, and the fleeting hour of victory that the wild grants to predator and protector alike.

memes.label: Gopher
memes.description: The fat-cheeked burrowing rodent of Smoky Land, one of the "Little People" of the forest floor whose small dramas unfold beneath the notice of larger predators.

memes.label: "Greenwood Club"
memes.description: "The fashionable social club in an Eastern seaboard city from which Hugh Gaylord is sent west — representing the civilized world he must leave behind to find himself."

memes.label: Mountain Grouse
memes.description: The mountain grouse of Smoky Land is a bird of the high perches and forest floors — prey to the lynx by night, a white-breasted banquet at Alice's campfire by day, and a creature whose stillness can confound even the keen eyes of Broken Fang the cougar.

memes.label: "Guardianship"
memes.description: "The sacred duty of the shepherd to protect the flock — the defining ethical relationship in Shepherds of the Wild, binding human and dog alike."

memes.label: "Murder of the Herder"
memes.description: "The murder of a sheep herder by José Mertos, acting on Landy Fargo's orders — the criminal act that reveals the violent undercurrent of Smoky Land's range conflicts."

memes.label: "Honor"
memes.description: "The moral code that governs the shepherd's relationship to his flock and his own conscience — a quiet, stoic virtue central to the ethics of Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Horse Creek"
memes.description: "A creek in Smoky Land — another of the named waterways in the region's sheep-raising country."

memes.label: "Hugh Gaylord"
memes.description: "The protagonist of Shepherds of the Wild — a city man who discovers his true strength as a shepherd in the wilderness of Smoky Land, learning the meaning of guardianship and self-reliance."

memes.label: "Hunger"
memes.description: "The primal drive that powers the wilderness food chain — a force both physical and metaphorical that governs predator and prey alike in Smoky Land."

memes.label: Hunting
memes.description: The primal act of pursuit and killing that structures life in the wilderness — both the literal predation of animals and the metaphorical hunt that shapes human conflict.

memes.label: "Instinct"
memes.description: "The innate knowledge that guides wild creatures — a form of wisdom older than reason that dominates the natural world of Smoky Land."

memes.label: Isolation
memes.description: The condition of being cut off from human society that defines life in the wilderness — both a burden to be endured and a catalyst for self-discovery.

memes.label: "José Mertos"
memes.description: "Landy Fargo's enforcer — a dangerous man who is no stranger to violence and who serves as the physical threat to the shepherds of Smoky Land."

memes.label: Landscapes and Terrain
memes.description: A thematic index of the landscapes, terrain, and geographic features that shape the physical world of Shepherds of the Wild — from deep canyons to high mountain passes.

memes.label: "Landy Fargo"
memes.description: "The primary antagonist of Shepherds of the Wild — a ruthless cattleman who seeks to drive the shepherds out of Smoky Land."

memes.label: "Law of the Wild"
memes.description: "The unwritten code that governs all life in Smoky Land — a system of power, survival, and order that operates beyond human law and morality."

memes.label: Lynx
memes.description: A stealthy feline predator of the Smoky Land wilderness, the lynx stalks the mountain grouse and small prey under the cover of darkness.

memes.label: "Madness"
memes.description: "The primal frenzy that overtakes predators when the bloodlust awakens — a temporary transcendence of fear and caution that reveals the wilderness's darkest truths."

memes.label: "Mercy"
memes.description: "A rare and often doubtful quality in the brutal world of Smoky Land — mercy appears as both a human virtue and a wilderness impossibility in Marshall's moral universe."

memes.label: Mink
memes.description: The mink is the smallest predator of the Smoky Land waters — a "little, deadly, white-fanged" hunter known to the river-folk as "Little Death," whose miniature ferocity mirrors the larger predators' hunting fever at a scale that fits between the stones of the riverbank.

memes.label: Most Referenced Pages
memes.description: The most frequently referenced pages across the Shepherds of the Wild wiki, ranked by total wikilink references.

memes.label: "Mountain"
memes.description: "The mountains of Smoky Land as both physical setting and spiritual presence — towering, eternal witnesses to the drama of flock and herder, symbols of permanence in a world of change."

memes.label: Nature
memes.description: The abstract force that governs life in the wilderness — neither benevolent nor malevolent, operating by laws older than human morality and indifferent to human desires.

memes.label: "Old Argali"
memes.description: "The patriarch of the bighorn sheep in the high peaks — Spot's wild father, whose autumn mating with a domestic ewe produced the novel's most extraordinary character."

memes.label: "Old Colonel"
memes.description: "Hugh Gaylord's mentor and the catalyst of his journey — a wise, fatherly figure who sees Hugh's potential and sends him west to discover himself."

memes.label: "Old Surefoot"
memes.description: "One of the two greatest bighorn rams of Smoky Land — rival to Old Argali and a symbol of the wild sheep's mastery of the high peaks."

memes.label: Organizations Index
memes.description: A dynamic index of organizations and groups in Shepherds of the Wild.

memes.label: Peace
memes.description: The rare and fragile condition of stillness in the wilderness — a temporary reprieve from danger that makes the constant threat bearable and gives meaning to the struggle.

memes.label: "Running Feet"
memes.description: "The named coyote of Smoky Land — a clever but cowardly predator cursed by Manitou, whose stalking of the sheep flock embodies wilderness predation in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Spread Horn"
memes.description: "The majestic bull elk whose movements open Shepherds of the Wild — the embodiment of instinctual wisdom and wilderness nobility in Smoky Land."

memes.label: "Pete"
memes.description: "The seasoned wilderness guide who accompanies Hugh Gaylord into Smoky Land — a rough, pragmatic mountain man who embodies the unvarnished reality of wilderness life."

memes.label: "Idaho"
memes.description: "The vast, rugged wilderness of central Idaho that forms the geographical setting of Shepherds of the Wild — a land of deep canyons, high peaks, and remote sheep ranges where the frontier still holds sway."

memes.label: Places Index
memes.description: A dynamic index of all locations in Shepherds of the Wild.

memes.label: Porcupine
memes.description: The guileless, slow-witted porcupine of the Smoky Land forest, known to the wild creatures as "Quill-back" — a creature so awkward that failing to catch one is a mark of shame among predators.

memes.label: "Predator"
memes.description: "The wild hunters of Smoky Land — puma, wolf, coyote, bear — who embody the wilderness's killing order and define the shepherd's eternal adversary."

memes.label: Predators and Prey
memes.description: A thematic index of predators, prey species, and related concepts in Shepherds of the Wild — the food chain that shapes the wilderness.

memes.label: Rabbit
memes.description: The rabbit and its high-country cousin the pika (rock rabbit) are common prey of Smoky Land, sustaining predators from the mink to the cougar through the cycles of hunger and hunting.

memes.label: Rockies
memes.description: The Rocky Mountains form the majestic alpine backbone of Smoky Land, a forbidding yet beautiful wilderness of snow peaks, glaciers, and timberline slopes in central Idaho.

memes.label: "Savagery"
memes.description: "The primal ferocity that dwells in both beast and man — in the wilderness an expression of natural order, in human beings a moral failing that the novel scrutinizes with unflinching clarity."

memes.label: Sheep Camp
memes.description: The sheep camp as a mobile home, micro-society, and frontier outpost — the nexus where the domestic world of the flock meets the wild.

memes.label: Shelter
memes.description: The fundamental need for protection in the wilderness — the tent, the firelight circle, and the arms of a loved one as defenses against the encroaching dark.

memes.label: "Shep"
memes.description: "The faithful shepherd dog — Hugh Gaylord's most trusted companion, whose deathless loyalty, instinctive wisdom, and unbreakable courage embody the novel's ideal of guardianship in its purest form."

memes.label: Shepherd
memes.description: The archetype of the shepherd — guardian, guide, and steward whose identity is defined by an unwavering commitment to protect the flock, even at the cost of life itself.

memes.label: "Shepherd Dog"
memes.description: "The shepherd dog as guardian, companion, and moral exemplar — a creature whose unwavering fidelity to the flock defines the novel's highest ideals of service and courage."

memes.label: "Silence"
memes.description: "The vast, primordial silence of the wilderness — a spiritual presence that speaks more powerfully than words in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: "Silver Creek"
memes.description: "A creek and surrounding district in the heart of Smoky Land — the center of the sheep-raising country where Hugh Gaylord tends his flock, the territory contested by Broken Fang, and the landscape that witnesses the novel's central conflicts between guardian and predator, shepherd and outlaw."

memes.label: "Smoky Land"
memes.description: "The central wilderness setting of Shepherds of the Wild — a rugged high plateau in the Idaho Rockies where Hugh Gaylord finds his calling as a shepherd, encompassing Silver Creek, Bear Canyon, and the surrounding wild ranges."

memes.label: Bighorn Sheep
memes.description: The bighorn sheep is the central prey species of Smoky Land in Shepherds of the Wild, embodying the vigilance and collective strength that prey animals need to survive among predators.

memes.label: Deer
memes.description: The primary prey species of Smoky Land, whose constant vigilance and sensory acuity define the baseline of the wilderness food chain.

memes.label: Elk (Wapiti)
memes.description: Majestic ungulate and one of the dominant herbivores of Smoky Land, embodied by the great bull Spread Horn.

memes.label: Grizzly Bear
memes.description: Apex predator of Smoky Land, the grizzly shares the mountain monarchy with the bull elk as one of the wilderness's ruling presences.

memes.label: Species Index
memes.description: A dynamic index of all wildlife species featured in Shepherds of the Wild.

memes.label: "Otter"
memes.description: "The semi-aquatic river hunter of Smoky Land — a fur-bearing predator of the trout pools and riffles whose abundance signals the prelapsarian wilderness in Shepherds of the Wild."

memes.label: Puma
memes.description: The puma (cougar) is the apex predator of Smoky Land in Shepherds of the Wild, embodied most notably by Broken Fang, the legendary cougar who rules a thousand square miles of Idaho forest.

memes.label: Salmon
memes.description: Anadromous fish of Smoky Land's rivers whose four-year migration and return to spawn embodies the novel's central theme of repatriation to the wild.

memes.label: Trout
memes.description: The river-dwelling fish of Smoky Land's streams, ranging from small resident trout to the great seagoing steelhead whose strike is described as a glimpse into the Promised Land.

memes.label: "Spot"
memes.description: "A bighorn ram born among domestic sheep — the offspring of Old Argali and a domestic ewe, whose wild heritage and dreams of the high peaks drive him to lead the flock to safety."

memes.label: Struggle
memes.description: The fundamental condition of existence in the wilderness — the continuous effort required to survive against predators, elements, and human enemies.

memes.label: Survival and Conflict
memes.description: A thematic index of survival, hunting, conflict, and danger — the forces that test every creature in Shepherds of the Wild.

memes.label: Themes and Motifs
memes.description: Thematic index of Shepherds of the Wild — key themes, motifs, and recurring ideas across characters, places, species, and concepts.

memes.label: "Trust"
memes.description: "The bond of mutual reliance between shepherd and dog, between creature and wilderness — a fragile but essential element of life in Smoky Land."

memes.label: "Upper Salmon"
memes.description: "The upper Salmon River region of Idaho — a mountainous area inhabited by hardy mountaineers and home to some of the West's finest hunting grounds."

memes.label: Vision
memes.description: The power of clear sight — both literal and spiritual — that the wilderness grants to those who watch the sheep, enabling them to see past the superficialities of civilization to the essential realities of life.

memes.label: "Wilderness"
memes.description: "The primeval, untamed natural world that dominates Smoky Land — the central philosophical force in Shepherds of the Wild, serving as both setting and moral crucible for every character who enters it."

memes.label: "Wolf"
memes.description: "The pack hunter of Smoky Land — represented by Cry-in-the-night, the wolf whose howl embodies the wilderness's eternal menace to the shepherd's flock."
